facts.statement: Command dispatch enters `compile`, which validates the entrypoint before delegating to `compile_eszip`.
The graph builder applies npm resolution/build options and lockfile state before packaging.
The completed graph is passed to `create_compile_binary_writer` and written as an ESZip-backed executable.
Unsupported npm entrypoint resolution is rejected before graph packaging with `UnsupportedNpmSpecifierEntrypointResolutionWay`.

band_derivation: New fixture-local task with five uniform pinned facts; tolerance is one full fact (1/5).
